title: Upstream source group
description: One file per update group under _meta/sources/. Groups are the unit of update checking (src/check_updates.py) — bodies update at different rates, and new agencies join by adding group files, never by changing tools.

kind.description: sp-listing: diff a SharePoint listing snapshot AND content-hash members; content-hash: hash members only; chapter-html: hash shared chapter snapshots (members may be sections of one snapshot)

listing_snapshot.description: sp-listing groups: path to the normalized listing snapshot JSON (carries the REST endpoint, view GUIDs, rows, and checker field config)

upstream_signal.description: Human note: what upstream mechanism announces changes and how often it moves

id.description: Document id, or shared snapshot id for chapter-html groups
